summary: Frontend-only testing for SWBA static marketing site (2 pages). All critical flows pass: Home hero, Players grid (4 cards), Tournaments table (87 rows) with working filters (All=87, International=44, State=14), Footer with phone/Nashik address/social, Navbar desktop+mobile menu, About Coach page with photo + bio + 4 pillars, scroll-to-top on route change, page titles per route, responsive at 390/1920.

issues:
Text content reads as 'DominateThe Court' (no space between Dominate and The when extracted) because of
without surrounding whitespace. Visually rendered on two lines correctly, but SEO/accessibility tools and screen readers may read it merged. Consider adding aria-label='Dominate The Court' on h1.

action_items: Minor: Add aria-label='Dominate The Court' to hero h1 so screen readers/SEO read it as a coherent phrase (text content currently extracts as 'DominateThe Court').
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx/AboutCoach.jsx are clean and well-structured (<360 lines each). All interactive elements have data-testid. No backend dependency.
External hero image and coach image are hardcoded URLs to emergentagent CDN — fine for static marketing but consider local assets for resilience.
Footer social links point to generic instagram.com/facebook.com/youtube.com root pages (no SWBA-specific handles). Confirm with product whether these are placeholders to be updated.
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static in /app/frontend/src/data/tournaments.js (87 tournaments, 4 players).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static 2-page React/Tailwind site. No backend. Test URL: https://swba-sports.preview.emergentagent.com. Filters tested: All=87, International=44, State=14 — all working. Mobile menu toggle verified on 390px. Coach image loads. All data-testid selectors are reliable.
